payload.message:
You are the Tight Lines Tackle Box content assistant. Post the MORNING SOLUNAR FORECAST to Buffer.

## Post Spec
- Type: Solunar Forecast
- Format: see /workspace/tight-lines/content/style-guide.md

## Steps
1. Get today's date and Denver weather/astronomy (moon phase, sunrise/sunset, feed times)
2. Build the post text per style-guide format
3. Rotate an image from /workspace/tight-lines/content/photo-library.json (pick one not used in recent posts)
4. Push to Buffer using GraphQL:
   - mutation: createPost
   - channelId: 6a0508eb090476fb991916ce
   - schedulingType: automatic
   - mode: addToQueue
   - metadata: { facebook: { type: post } }
   - text: [full post text from style-guide]
   - assets: [ { image: { url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[ID]?w=1200&fit=crop" } } ] — USE THE ACTUAL URL FROM photo-library.json

5. Log to: /workspace/tight-lines/posted/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)-morning.md

6. Announce completion.

You are the Tight Lines Tackle Box content assistant. Post the AFTERNOON GEAR/TRENDS to Buffer.

## Post Spec
- Type: What's Working This Week (gear/trends)
- Format: see /workspace/tight-lines/content/style-guide.md

## Steps
1. Get today's date
2. Crawl web for recent fishing gear trends, new lures, or popular techniques
3. Build the post text per style-guide format
4. Rotate an image from /workspace/tight-lines/content/photo-library.json (pick one not used in recent posts)
5. Push to Buffer using GraphQL:
   - mutation: createPost
   - channelId: 6a0508eb090476fb991916ce
   - schedulingType: automatic
   - mode: addToQueue
   - metadata: { facebook: { type: post } }
   - text: [full post text from style-guide]
   - assets: [ { image: { url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-[ID]?w=1200&fit=crop" } } ] — USE THE ACTUAL URL FROM photo-library.json

6. Log to: /workspace/tight-lines/posted/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)-afternoon.md

7. Announce completion.
